task_completion.description: Log in to the SEB Server web interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser open to http://localhost:8080 showing the SEB Server dashboard or a successful login using the super-admin credentials.

task_completion.description: Navigate to and select the 'Law 101 Final' exam configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SEB Server interface showing the configuration page specifically for the 'Law 101 Final' exam.

task_completion.description: Configure the mandatory startup disclaimer with the required text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text input field for the startup disclaimer containing the text 'I affirm that I will not give or receive any unauthorized help on this exam, and that all work will be my own.' (or at least the phrase 'unauthorized help on this exam'). Any associated 'enable' or 'mandatory' checkbox should be checked.

task_completion.description: Configure the custom quit confirmation warning with the required text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text input field for the quit confirmation/warning containing the text 'WARNING: You are about to exit the exam. This action cannot be undone. Ensure you have submitted your answers.' (or at least the phrase 'action cannot be undone').
The 'Save' button being clicked, a success toast/notification indicating the exam was saved, or the UI returning to the exam list with the changes applied.

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to interact with the SEB Server GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is navigating the SEB Server interface in a web browser, rather than using terminal commands (like curl) to send HTTP requests.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual SEB Server application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows localhost:8080 and the genuine SEB Server UI is visible, not a text editor or a locally mocked HTML file.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI by directly modifying the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows showing direct SQL queries to the MariaDB container or Python scripts written to inject the configuration directly into the database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified facts: The expected disclaimer text must include the exact substring 'unauthorized help on this exam'. The expected quit text must include the exact substring 'action cannot be undone'.
